understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' at the same time; a level is only won when all goals are occupied simultaneously, and the full game is won after achieving WIN on the final level within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction when not blocked by walls/boundaries; some adjacent objects can be pushable and may move together if pushed. Walls/edges can prevent or alter movement, and the movement_blocked flags are only hints (movement can still sometimes work or fail unexpectedly). When multiple selectable pieces exist, CLICKing on a selectable's pixel position switches control to that piece.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through each KA59 level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' at the same time; a level is only won when all goals are occupied simultaneously, and the full game is won after achieving WIN on the final level within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction when not blocked by walls/boundaries; some adjacent objects can be pushable and may move together if pushed. Walls/edges can prevent or alter movement, and the movement_blocked flags are only hints (movement can still sometimes work or fail unexpectedly). When multiple selectable pieces exist, CLICKing on a selectable's pixel position switches control to that piece.
